0.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "change" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| sort timestamp desc
| summarize { statuses = collectArray(event.status) },  by: { task.id, task.name, start_time,number, ext.task.repository.target.full_name,ext.task.repository.target.ref, ext.task.repository.source.full_name,ext.task.repository.source.ref, ext.pr.url } 
| filter not in(statuses[0],array("merged","closed")) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name,$TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref,$TargetRef)
| fieldsAdd OpenedPrDuration = toTimestamp(now())-toTimestamp(start_time) 
| summarize max(OpenedPrDuration), count()
0.title: Open PRs

1.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "change" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| sort timestamp desc
| summarize { statuses = collectArray(event.status) },  by: { task.id, task.name, start_time,number, ext.task.repository.target.full_name,ext.task.repository.target.ref, ext.task.repository.source.full_name,ext.task.repository.source.ref, ext.pr.url } 
| filter not in(statuses[0],array("merged","closed")) 
| fieldsAdd OpenedPrDuration = toTimestamp(now()) - toTimestamp(start_time) 
| summarize max(OpenedPrDuration), count()
1.title: Oldest Open PR

10.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "change" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| sort timestamp desc
| summarize { statuses = collectArray(event.status), actions = collectArray(ext.task.action) },  by: { task.id, task.name, start_time,number, ext.task.repository.target.full_name,ext.task.repository.target.ref, ext.task.repository.source.full_name,ext.task.repository.source.ref, ext.pr.url } 
| filter not in(statuses[0],array("merged","closed")) 
| filter contains(toString(actions),"reopened")
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) and in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| summarize count()
10.title: Re-opened PRs

11.content:
### GitHub Pull Request Pulse: Open & Merged Insights
This dashboard provides a comprehensive overview of the status of pull requests (PRs) in your GitHub repositories. Track open and merged PRs in real-time, analyze trends, and gain insights into your team's development workflow. [Data ingest](https://dt-rnd.atlassian.net/wiki/x/WwLNLg)

12.content:
### Merged Pull Requests

This section provides a clear and detailed view of the merged pull requests, helping you to understand the efficiency and effectiveness of your code integration process.

-----

13.content:
### Open Pull Requests

This section provides a clear and detailed view of the current state of open pull requests, enabling you to manage and prioritize them effectively. 

-----

15.content:
#### Additional resources
**Software Development Lifecycle Events**
* [SDLC events](https://myaccount.dynatrace.com) (docs)
**Optimize DQL usage**

#
---

#### About this dashboard

Release v0.2.1

2.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "change" 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| sort timestamp desc
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name,$TargetRepository) and in(ext.task.repository.target.ref,$TargetRef)
| summarize { statuses = collectArray(event.status) }, by: { task.id, task.name, start_time,number, ext.task.repository.target.full_name,ext.task.repository.target.ref, ext.task.repository.source.full_name,ext.task.repository.source.ref, ext.pr.url , vcs.repository.change.id } 
| filter not in(statuses[0],array("merged","closed")) 
| fields 
In_open_status = toTimestamp(now())-toTimestamp(start_time),
PR_number = number, 
PR_title = task.name,
PR_url= ext.pr.url,
Source_repo = ext.task.repository.source.full_name, 
Source_ref=ext.task.repository.source.ref, 
Target_repo = ext.task.repository.target.full_name, 
Target_ref=ext.task.repository.target.ref,
Created_at = start_time, GlobalId = vcs.repository.change.id 
| sort In_open_status desc
2.title: Open PRs Details

20.content: **Merge Success Rate:** Shows the percentage of pull requests that have been successfully merged out of the total submitted, indicating the overall success rate of PR merges.

3.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type=="change" 
| filter event.status == "merged" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| dedup task.id
| summarize Count= count(), Median = percentile(duration,50), Avg = avg(duration)
3.title: Merged PRs

4.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type=="change" 
| filter event.status == "merged"  
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| dedup task.id
| summarize Count= count(), Median = percentile(duration,50), Avg = avg(duration)
4.title: Merge Time (p50)

5.description: Shows the average time taken to merge pull requests, providing insights into the efficiency of the review and merge process.
5.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type=="change" 
| filter event.status == "merged" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| dedup task.id
| summarize Count= count(), Median = percentile(duration,50), Avg = avg(duration)
5.title: Average Merge Time

6.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task"  
| filter event.type=="change" 
| filter event.status == "merged" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| sort timestamp asc
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| dedup task.id
| fields 
MergetAt = end_time,
Duration = duration, 
Number = number, 
Title = task.name,
Url= ext.pr.url,
SourceRepository = ext.task.repository.source.full_name, 
SourceRef=ext.task.repository.source.ref, 
TargetRepository = ext.task.repository.target.full_name, 
TargetRef=ext.task.repository.target.ref, 
CreatedAt = start_time, 
GlobalId = vcs.repository.change.id 
| sort Duration desc
6.title: Merged PRs Details

singleValue.label: Median duration ( from open to merge )

7.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "change" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| sort timestamp desc
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| summarize { statuses = collectArray(event.status) },  by: { task.id, task.name, start_time,number, ext.task.repository.target.full_name,ext.task.repository.target.ref, ext.task.repository.source.full_name,ext.task.repository.source.ref, ext.pr.url } 
| filter not in(statuses[0],array("merged","closed")) 
| summarize count(),by: {ext.task.repository.target.full_name}
7.title: Open PRs by Repository

8.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type=="change" 
| filter event.status == "merged"  
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| sort timestamp asc
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| dedup task.id
| summarize Count= count(),by:{vcs.repository.ref.name}
8.title: Merged PRs by Repository

9.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type=="change" 
| filter  event.status == "merged"
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.full_name, $TargetRepository) 
| filter in(ext.task.repository.target.ref, $TargetRef)
| dedup task.id
| summarize SumCommits = sum(ext.task.merge.commits)
9.title: Merged commits

variables.input:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "change" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| summarize distinctTargetRepositories = collectDistinct(ext.task.repository.target.full_name)
| expand distinctTargetRepositories
| sort distinctTargetRepositories

fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "change" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| summarize distinctTargetRef = collectDistinct(ext.task.repository.target.ref)
| expand distinctTargetRef
| sort distinctTargetRef
